_comment: ZERO-TOUCH LINKING. Rename this to 'ondeck.json' and copy it onto the Raspberry Pi's boot partition (the FAT volume that mounts on your computer when you insert the freshly-flashed SD card). Combined with Wi-Fi set via Raspberry Pi Imager (gear icon), the Pi connects and links itself to the cloud on first boot with no setup-hotspot step. boot_mode.py deletes this file after linking. Use a 'pairing_code' (generate it in the cloud portal under Devices) so the Pi gets its own revocable per-device token. Alternatively a raw 'sync_token' matching the cloud ONDECK_SYNC_TOKEN also works.
